text.title: BA Knowledge Areas Detail Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying knowledge-areas-detail. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: Skipping KA-4 strategy on transformation to save time.
antipattern.root-cause: Schedule pressure makes BA skip strategy.
antipattern.fix: Block transformation engagement without KA-4 outputs; strategy gap drives downstream chaos.

antipattern.symptom: Change request routed to full KA-1..KA-6 cycle.
antipattern.fix: Route to KA-3 + KA-5 only; full cycle is overhead.

antipattern.symptom: Missing KA mapping for audit deliverables.
antipattern.fix: Build audit-mapping table during engagement, not at audit time.

antipattern.symptom: Mixing PMBOK lifecycle with BABOK KAs.
antipattern.root-cause: Sponsor's organisation uses PMBOK; BA imports BABOK.
antipattern.fix: Pick one canonical framework; explicit translation if both required.
